step.name: identify-smell
step.action: Name the smell from a closed list (long-function, magic-number, etc).

step.name: pick-transform
step.action: Walk the decision tree to the canonical transform.

step.name: draft-plan
step.action: Emit one entry in the move plan with intent.
step.decision-gate: If multiple transforms needed, split into sequential plan steps; never one commit.

step.name: apply-and-test
step.action: Per step: apply transform via IDE / LSP, run tests, commit with named transform.

step.name: open-pr
step.action: Open refactor-only PR; flag behaviour-change as out-of-scope.
